comments.body:
Hi team, I would love to look into this WASM e2e test failure.
It seems like `main Stdout` is being duplicated in the log output, possibly due to state leakage between tests or the WASM instance initializing twice. Could you please assign this to me?

> Hi team, I would love to look into this WASM e2e test failure.
It seems like main Stdout is being duplicated in the log output, possibly due to state leakage between tests or the WASM instance initializing twice. Could you please assign this to me?

Done. Thank you so much for your interest in the Dapr Open Source project, and for your contribution!! 🙌  👏 🎉
